testcase.name: Segment API E2E › GET /api/segments?productId={id} - empty segment list
Segment API E2E › POST /api/segments - create root segment
Segment API E2E › POST /api/segments - create child segment
Segment API E2E › GET /api/segments?productId={id} - returns both segments
Segment API E2E › PUT /api/segments/{id} - update segment name
Segment API E2E › POST + PATCH /api/segments - reparent segment
Segment API E2E › DELETE /api/segments/{id} - delete root cascades children
Segment Reparent (Drag & Drop) E2E › PATCH /api/segments/{id}/parent - reparent segment success
Segment Reparent (Drag & Drop) E2E › PATCH /api/segments/{id}/parent - reparent to root (null)
Segment Reparent (Drag & Drop) E2E › PATCH /api/segments/{id}/parent - circular reference prevention
Segment Reparent (Drag & Drop) E2E › PATCH /api/segments/{id}/parent - self as parent prevention
Segment Reparent (Drag & Drop) E2E › PATCH /api/segments/{id}/parent - 404 for non-existent segment
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › api/segment.spec.ts:318:7 › Segment Reparent (Drag & Drop) E2E › PATCH /api/segments/{id}/parent - 404 for non-existent segment
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
Expected: 404 Received: 400
323 | 324 | // Verify: Should fail with 404 > 325 | expect(reparentResp.status()).toBe(404); | ^ 326 | }); 327 | 328 | test.afterAll(async () => { at /Users/yeongmi/dev/qa/my-atlas/qa/api/segment.spec.ts:325:35
